doubl.commitSubject: feat(personalization): launch digital fit passport and body analysis engine

mds.commitSubject: feat(admissions): build masters of data science admissions managment application platform
mds.description: Developed a full-stack platform for Masters of Data Science application management, automating the admissions workflow for over 1,000 annual student applications. This system streamlined the entire process from application ingestion and faculty review to final decision-making, significantly reducing administrative overhead and manual data handling. The platform enhanced data integrity and security through a robust backend architecture, normalized database design, and role-based authentication for faculty and administrators.

makerspace.commitSubject: feat(memberships): launch integrated platform for 1,000+ members
makerspace.description: Engineered a comprehensive membership and operations platform serving over 1,000 members, automating critical functions from workshop enrollment and equipment reservations to recurring billing and physical access control. This full-stack system integrated payment processing, digital signature generation, email notifications, and IoT-based access management, significantly streamlining administrative overhead and enhancing member experience.

learncoding.commitSubject: feat(learncoding): launch learning platform to learn programming
learncoding.description: Developed and deployed a comprehensive adaptive learning platform for UBC's Faculty of Science, serving over 500 students. This system features interactive code visualizers, multi-language support, sandbox environments, and gamification to enhance learning. The platform integrates with the UBC Canvas API for automated grade posting, reducing manual overhead, and incorporates granular access controls for faculty management. Additionally, it includes an AI-powered content generator for personalized learning paths and code translation, while ensuring robust security, analytics, and server maintenance.

teaching-assistant.commitSubject: feat(teaching): enhance computer science curriculum and instruction
